usage: create_constraint_mode [-help] [-ilm_sdc_files {file1.sdc file2.sdc ...}] -name <modeName> -sdc_files {file1.sdc file2.sdc ...} [-tcl_vars {{var_name1 value1} {var_name2 value2} {var_name3 value3} ...}]

options.name: -ilm_sdc_files
options.description: {file1.sdc file2.sdc ...} Specifies a Tcl list of ILM SDC files to be included in the constraint mode

options.name: -name
options.description: Specifies the name of the constraint mode to be created

options.name: -sdc_files
options.description: Specifies a Tcl list of SDC files to be included in the constraint mode

options.name: -tcl_vars
options.description: {{var_name1 value1} {var_name2 value2} {var_name3 value3} ...} Specifies a list of tcl variables and values to be used in the constraint mode
